creator: otis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 217600
net-mgmt/zabbix5-server: Update to 5.0.3

Hi,

please find the patches attached.

Complete changelog is kinda extensive, see https://www.zabbix.com/rn/rn5.0.3
